name: MoneyGram
description_short: New Albany, IN's 24-hour MoneyGram at 1950 State St offers money transfers and check cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 1950 State St in New Albany, IN, this standalone MoneyGram is open around the clock every single day of the week. The 24-hour service means you can access money transfers and check cashing whether you're in New Albany early in the morning, during the afternoon, or late at night. This level of availability distinguishes New Albany's MoneyGram location from traditional banking hours.

The MoneyGram at 1950 State St in New Albany, IN specializes in domestic and international money transfers, check cashing, and money order services. Call +1 800-746-7287 if you have questions about current fees, transfer speeds, or how to set up a transaction.

New Albany residents relying on quick money transfers or check cashing should bring a valid government-issued ID to complete any transaction. The 24-hour schedule is especially valuable when you need services outside normal business hours, making it a practical choice for the New Albany community.
pros: Extensive physical location network across Indiana with presence in 100+ cities and towns
Dual-channel service model offering both online and in-person transaction options
Interactive map interface with searchable location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Coverage in both major metropolitan areas (Indianapolis, Fort Wayne, Evansville) and rural communities
Convenient accessibility for customers who prefer face-to-face financial transactions
Established brand with long operational history in money transfer services
cons: Website provides no transparent fee schedule or pricing information for comparative shopping
No details on transfer speeds, delivery timeframes, or service guarantees
Limited information about exchange rates for international transfers or conversion costs
Physical location dependency may result in longer transaction times compared to fully digital competitors
No information about customer service hours, support channels, or dispute resolution processes
best_for: Indiana residents sending money to family or friends domestically or internationally
Unbanked or underbanked consumers preferring in-person transactions over digital transfers
Customers in rural areas requiring accessible physical locations for money transfer needs
Users seeking immediate face-to-face service without relying on online platforms
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best suited for Indiana residents and visitors requiring accessible, in-person money transfer services across a wide geographic area. The primary caveat is the absence of transparent pricing and fee information on the provided website, making it essential for prospective users to independently verify current rates and competitive offerings before committing to a transfer.
services: In-person fund transfer at physical locations
Interactive location mapping and search functionality
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1950 State St, New Albany, IN. 24-hour money transfers and check cashing.
